description_long: This is a classic Adidas Tango España football, predominantly white with bold black geometric patterns and distinct branding. The surface features a series of interlocking curved triangles and pentagons, creating a visually striking and iconic look. The ball displays the Adidas logo, the word 'Tango', and text indicating it was the official match ball of the 1982 FIFA World Cup. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with visible seams between the panels, suggesting a traditional stitched construction. The ball is spherical and of standard size, suitable for professional play in urban parks, streets, or sports fields. There are no visible signs of wear, scuffing, or deformation, indicating it is in new condition.
description: A white Adidas Tango España football with bold black geometric patterns, official 1982 World Cup branding, and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Adidas logo, 'Tango España' branding, and official 1982 World Cup text, with clear black geometric patterns.
description_view_1: Top view highlighting the interlocking black and white panel design, with no visible branding or text.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the geometric pattern and panel seams, with minimal branding visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black and white panel design, with a partial glimpse of the official text.
